title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 524.030 - Tenants in common may sue jointly
text:
524.030.  Tenants in common may sue jointly. — Two or more tenants in common may join in the action, and jointly prosecute and sustain such action for the recovery of the estate by them owned in common.
(RSMo 1939 § 1531) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1367; 1919 § 1817; 1909 § 2384
